title: Kurukshetra Tubewell Operator Recruitment 2026, Free Application Form & Apply Now -
short_info: Kurukshetra Tubewell Operator Recruitment 2026: Block Development and Panchayat Officer, Shahabad Markanda (Kurukshetra) has issued a notification for the position of Tubewell Operator (jalkarmi). The recruitment drive comprises 01 vacancy. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 02 June 2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the Kurukshetra Tubewell Operator Recruitment 2026 is provided below.
